parsed_output.justification: James provides contradictory claims throughout the discussion. He first suggests that Paul switched him and Mitchell (Line 68), but then claims Paul was lying about the switch (Line 72). Furthermore, James claims to be the Robber who stole Mitchell's insomnia (Line 74), but Mitchell confirms he woke up as the Insomniac (Line 67), which makes James's claim impossible. Given these inconsistencies and his aggressive push to vote for Laura, James is the most likely Werewolf.
